channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours  The Washington Post
  2. Iran Steps Up Retaliatory Strikes as U.S. Prepares for Long War: Live Updates  The New York Times
  3. Iranian Red Crescent Society says at least 787 people in Iran killed in US-Israeli airstrikes  WRAL
  4. Iran Live Updates: Israel Strikes Tehran, Beirut in Widening Conflict  WSJ
  5. Netanyahu says US-Israeli war on Iran 'not going to take years'  Reuters

item.title: State Department Urges Americans to Leave Middle East Now - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. State Department Urges Americans to Leave Middle East Now  Bloomberg.com

  3. US urges citizens to immediately leave over a dozen Middle East countries  Al Jazeera
  4. As Iran expands retaliatory attacks, U.S. urges Americans to leave Middle East  PBS
  5. Security Alert – Shelter-in-Place (March 1, 2026)  U.S. Embassy Doha – Qatar (.gov)

item.title: Starmer at odds with Trump in biggest disagreement yet - BBC
item.description:
1. Starmer at odds with Trump in biggest disagreement yet  BBC

item.title: Trump Signals U.S. Is Prepared for a Long War Against Iran - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Trump Signals U.S. Is Prepared for a Long War Against Iran  The New York Times
  2. Live updates: US Gulf allies fend off attacks as Trump warns Iran of ‘big wave’ of strikes  CNN

  4. U.S. Sends More Troops to the Mideast as Iran War Expands  The New York Times
  5. Trump says Iran war could last weeks, US citizens in more than a dozen countries urged to leave  AP News

item.title: Attack on Iran could buoy Trump in talks with China's Xi - Reuters
item.description:
1. Attack on Iran could buoy Trump in talks with China's Xi  Reuters
  2. U.S. Attacks on Iran Test Fragile Truce With China  The New York Times
  3. Beijing Doesn’t Think Like Washington—and the Iran Conflict Shows Why  Carnegie Endowment for International Peace
  4. China’s ice-cold calculus over Iran  The Economist
  5. Trump’s show of force in the Middle East creates a weakness China can exploit  The Guardian

item.title: Inside the plan to kill Ali Khamenei - Financial Times
item.description:
1. Inside the plan to kill Ali Khamenei  Financial Times

item.title: US Embassy in Riyadh hit by drones amid Iran fallout, Saudi officials say - Axios
item.description:
1. US Embassy in Riyadh hit by drones amid Iran fallout, Saudi officials say  Axios

  4. Live updates: Iranian strikes hit Lebanon and Saudi Arabia as US and Israel target nuclear facilities  AP News
  5. Iran war live updates: Israel bolsters forces in southern Lebanon, drones hit U.S. embassy in Riyadh as markets fall  CNBC

item.title: Lebanon’s leaders turn on Hezbollah as airstrikes hit Beirut and thousands seek shelter - AP News
item.description: Lebanon’s leaders turn on Hezbollah as airstrikes hit Beirut and thousands seek shelter  AP NewsView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says - Reuters

item.title: Travelers Stuck in Dubai Face ‘Chaos and Confusion’ Amid Flight Cancellations - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Travelers Stuck in Dubai Face ‘Chaos and Confusion’ Amid Flight Cancellations  The New York Times

  3. I flew to Dubai for my 30th birthday. Now I'm stranded 8,000 miles from home and terrified after the US strikes on Iran.  Business Insider
  4. They flew to Dubai for a romantic anniversary getaway. Then the bombing started.  NBC News
  5. I'm raising 2 kids in Abu Dhabi. I'm not panicking — but I feel powerless.  Yahoo

item.title: Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks  CBS News

  4. Six Troops Killed in Kuwait in Iran Drone Attack  WSJ

item.title: World reacts as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran sprawl into regional war - PBS
item.description:
1. World reacts as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran sprawl into regional war  PBS

  3. France is ready to help Gulf countries targeted by Iran  Reuters

  5. Macron says US and Israeli strikes on Iran have led to 'an unprecedented regional escalation'  Yahoo
